blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Meadows is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 21 inches of snowfall of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,023 ft. Looking ahead, 28 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tomorrow: 3.6" of snow, highs of 37°F, gusts to 41 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 34.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 8" over the past week. Current depth: 50".
